name: Wand of Continuation (3rd-Rank Spell)
description:
This wand increases a spell's duration. Yellow embers spiral over its surface until the spell ends.

Activate Cast a Spell; The activation takes (2 Actions) if the spell normally takes (1 Action) to cast, or (3 Actions) if the spell normally takes (2 Actions)

Frequency Once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell, and its duration is increased by half.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of a spell of the appropriate rank. The spell must have a casting time of (1 Action) or (2 Actions) and a duration no less than 10 minutes and no greater than 1 hour.
